reasoning: Emotional (60%): The box icon lands warm and treasure-inviting — orange/brown wood body with blue gem accent is solidly Zelda-palette and reads charming at all tested zoom levels. Saturated enough to avoid grimness. However, it sits closer to 'functional item' than 'toy-diorama delightful': the silhouette is a plain rectangle, and the blue element feels decorative rather than characterful. Missing the round-friendly punch that Echoes of Wisdom targets. Emotional sub-score ~7. Technical (40%): 1px hard outlines present and clean; no visible anti-aliasing; pixel-grid-snapped. Shading reads as 2-tone on the lid and side panels rather than a full 3-tone ramp — highlights are present but midtone/shadow distinction collapses at native resolution. Construction is otherwise solid and hand-pixeled. Technical sub-score ~8. Weighted total: 0.6×7 + 0.4×8 = 7.4 → 7. Marginal — passes technical bar, emotional vibrancy needs a saturation lift and silhouette softening to hit pass threshold.
